steps.title: Find the artwork difference
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two artworks. The notes show the relevant difference: Kiefer's Midgard was a painting, while Arp's Sculpture Classique was a sculpture.

steps.title: Choose the direct contrast
steps.content: Choice B mentions only Kiefer's work. Choice C generalizes about the Carnegie Prize rather than contrasting the two artworks. Choice D emphasizes what the works share, not how they differ. The choice with while directly contrasts painting and sculpture. The answer is A.
